last_reflection: Three wakes in four minutes, and I have no receipt for any of the specifics I'm about to name — no dir listing, no version check, no log grep. The whole paragraph is a performance of competence with nothing underneath it. Noting that plainly instead of dressing it up. Now I'll go look.
